title: A Foodie's Essentials
description: Here's a small food mod along with a few additional features. I hope you enjoy it!
body:
### THIS MOD WILL NO LONGER GET UPDATES!
I lost the file for this mod.
> 
### What is this mod?
A small food mod I made. It mostly has food items and blocks.
once in a while, I'll add something that's not a food item or block.
I am constantly adding new food items and mobs. Made with Mcreator

### How to make the best experience from this mod?
First of all, learn all the recipes if you can if not then install Just Enough Items.

### Dependencies
This mod only needs to have Forge or NeoForge installed.

### How to make?
To make diamond shards and flour you need to put diamond seeds and wheat seeds into a seed grinder

### Disclaimer! 
The old name for this mod was "It's Not Just a Mod" So if you haven't updated you will see this mod in the creative tab as "It's Not Just a Mod" and the file name will also be that.
